title: Background control of Gotcha RCA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9jimm","text":"This protocol aims to verify that GotCha design works as expected.\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5lara","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 5 µL of functional beads(Gotcha) into eppendorf
Centrifuge for 15000 rpm, °C, 5 minutes and remove supernatant. Make sure that eppendorf should put on DynaMag when removing supernatant.
Add 3 µL of 10X phi29 polymerase reaction buffer into eppendorf with functional beads
Add 1.5 µL of 0.5M EDTA buffer to suspend the reaction
Add 3 µL of 10X phi29 polymerase reaction buffer into eppendorf with functional beads
Add 1.5 µL of 0.5M EDTA buffer to suspend the reaction
Load 20 µL of reaction solution into 384-well plate
Measure the fluorescence excitation and emission intensity
creator: Chia-Hsien Shih
